title: Crispy Uruguayan Beef Pie
description: A savory, crumbly Uruguayan beef pie with a crispy shortcrust, enriched with halal gelatin leaves and finished under a broiler for a golden top.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 200 °C (392 °F). Soak the gelatin leafs in cold water for 10 minutes, then squeeze out excess water.
In a large skillet over medium heat, sauté the onion, carrots, celery, and garlic in a splash of olive oil until softened, about 5–7 minutes.
Add the halal beef mince and cook until browned, breaking up the meat with a spoon, about 8–10 minutes. Season with salt, pepper, thyme, and oregano.
Pour in the beef broth, bring to a gentle simmer, and cook until reduced by half, about 10 minutes. Remove from heat.
Whisk the soaked gelatin leafs into the hot meat mixture until fully dissolved. Let the mixture cool slightly.
Roll out the shortcrust pastry and line a 9‑inch pie dish. Spoon the meat filling into the crust and smooth the top.
Brush the crust edges with beaten egg, cover with another pastry sheet, seal the edges, and cut a few slits for venting.
Place the pie in the oven and broil for 5–6 minutes until the crust is golden brown.
Remove from the oven, let it rest for 5 minutes, then slice and serve hot.
